request_summary: Assemble the context needed to review the truthful control-surface slice before expanding the bounded baseline.
decision_to_be_made: Should ProductOS treat the current runtime bundle as trustworthy enough to score and promote release claims?

mission_router.routing_rationale: Start every next-version mission in discover, then expand only when the prior phase stays reviewable and evidence-backed.
stop_conditions: Stop if evidence freshness or provenance becomes unclear.
Stop if the current phase output is not PM-reviewable.
Stop before downstream release movement unless PM approval is explicit.

operating_norms: Treat the repository as the system of record.
Keep PM approval explicit for decision-driving scope and release movement.
Preserve observed versus inferred claims when evidence is incomplete.
Prefer the smallest coherent slice that can be validated end to end.

quality_contract.decision_needed: Decide whether the current runtime can score itself without additional provenance and eval hardening.
evidence: The design review reports mixed seeded and generated provenance.
The current CLI still reports all-green summaries.
alternatives: Hold release scoring until provenance is explicit
Ship the bounded baseline with watch-level review gates
quality_contract.recommendation: Ship the bounded baseline, but keep truthfulness and eval regressions visible instead of claiming full promotion.
risks: The system may still sound healthier than it is.
Scoring can drift if evals are not frozen.
quality_contract.next_action: Run the frozen eval suite and route the failing slices into bounded fixes.

evidence_bundle.summary: The current portfolio review still reports all major slices as promoted.
The architecture review says runtime truth, seeded fixtures, and self-scoring remain too tightly coupled.

contradictions: CLI health is green while the review notes unresolved truthfulness gaps.
open_questions: Which feature should be rescored first once provenance is explicit?
recommended_next_action: Treat the runtime as watch-level until eval and provenance signals become explicit inputs to scoring.
